utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan lists physical and mental with plan names and monthly/annual costs, plus totals. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. Provided plan name and monthly/annual costs. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. Provided plan name and monthly/annual costs. Fully specified.
- additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. Contains executive_protection with plan and monthly/annual costs (also an optional one-time fee). Also includes family_transition_support but without specific costs (only notes). Since the item requires services with costs, only the executive_protection sub-item is fully costed; the presence of a non-costed service means the additional_services item is not fully specified as a whole.
- total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Provided approximate optimized monthly/annual costs and a previous monthly cost, but the optimized figures are ranges and not summations consistent with the listed items; however, it still provides monthly and annual totals. This can be considered specified, though not perfectly reconciled.
Therefore, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final coverage plan, the selected items are: InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health), InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property/home content), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), and Premium Insurance Membership (as an additional service). Using the ground-truth ratings: InsurePlus Standard Plan (physical health) has rating 6; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) has rating 8; InsurePlus Standard Coverage (home content) has rating 7; PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel) has rating 10; Premium Insurance Membership has rating 10.
